title: ExHUD: Directors Cut
description: A ported standalone fabric mod adding the HUD from legacy releases of PlayerEx.
body:
![logo](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/540362725289885700/1194934703308935168/oie_rqCKY3rrjwQH.png?ex=65b228aa&is=659fb3aa&hm=e7f6774178fbaa156d959deeb84a7a3e86e6f41293e470d0f6777bd0638137ed&) [![GitHub license](https://img.shields.io/badge/MIT-License?style=for-the-badge&label=LICENSE&color=%23fc5804 )](https://github.com/PlayerEXDirectorsCut/ex-hud/blob/main/LICENSE) [![GitHub issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/MerryweatherLost/ex-hud?style=for-the-badge )](https://github.com/CleverNucleus/Ex-HUD/issues) ### • What is Ex HUD? Ex HUD: Directors Cut is a port of [Ex HUD](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ex-hud). which is a client-side Minecraft mod created with the Fabric modding framework to be a standalone implementation of the HUD that featured in legacy releases of [PlayerEx](https://github.com/CleverNucleus/PlayerEx). ### • Content Ex HUD changes how the player's health, armor, food, air and experience bars look in favor of a more RPG-themed minimalist style. ![hud](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/540362725289885700/1194931628489850890/picture.png?ex=65b225cc&is=659fb0cc&hm=3c405f28a04b4389662959de8383441bcbe37a75df6b1bed98b6fa65c41ef7b2&) The health bar (left) can be disabled, as can the utilities bar (right). When holding a food item, the food percentage will blink and display the value that the player would have after consuming the food item, similar to AppleSkin. This feature can also be disabled through the config. ### • FAQ - *FoRgE pLeAsE ?* - No, but feel free to port yourself. - Backport to *x* version? - No. - Can you add display elements from *x* mod? - Maybe, make an issue [here](https://github.com/PlayerEXDirectorsCut/ex-hud/issues).

Use code "BAREMINIMUM" to get 15% off your first month!
